headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific acquires Clario for nearly $8.9bn
summary: Clario will become part of Thermo Fisher’s laboratory products and biopharma services segment.

headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific and SHL Medical Collaborate to Deliver Fully Integrated Drug-Device Solutions
summary: RIDGEFIELD, N.J., March 25, 2026--Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., the world leader in serving science, today announced a strategic collaboration with SHL Medical, a leading provider of advanced drug delivery systems, alongside an expansion of sterile fill-finish and autoinjector final assembly capacity at its Ridgefield, NJ site. Together, these investments establish a fully integrated U.S.-based offering spanning sterile manufacturing, device assembly and commercial packaging for drug-device com

headline: Thermo Fisher completes $8.9B buyout of Clario
summary: Thermo Fisher plans to create a fast-growing business by integrating Clario’s data capture and management system with its existing capabilities.
